annotations.content:
Midsummer on the tundra
and the sun does not set.
Midsummer on the tundra and the sun does not set.
At these latitudes, the sun's rays are glancing
At these latitudes, the sun's rays are glancing

and not enough of their energy
reaches the ground to enable trees to grow.
and not enough of their energy reaches the ground to enable trees to grow.

You need to travel five hundred miles
south from here before that is possible.
You need to travel five hundred miles south from here before that is possible.

These stunted shrubs mark the tree line,
the beginning of the Boreal forest,
These stunted shrubs mark the tree line, the beginning of the Boreal forest,

The needle—shaped leaves of the conifers
are virtually inedible,
The needle—shaped leaves of the conifers are virtually inedible,
so this forest supports very little animal life.
so this forest supports very little animal life.

It's a silent place where the snow
is unmarked by footprints.
It's a silent place where the snow is unmarked by footprints.

In the arctic winter,
snow forms a continuous blanket across the land.
In the arctic winter, snow forms a continuous blanket across the land.

But as spring creeps up from the south,
the taiga is unveiled.
But as spring creeps up from the south, the taiga is unveiled.
This vast forest circling the globe
This vast forest circling the globe
contains a third of all the trees on Earth
contains a third of all the trees on Earth

and produces so much oxygen,
it changes the composition of the atmosphere.
and produces so much oxygen, it changes the composition of the atmosphere.

As we travel south,
so the sun's influence grows stronger
As we travel south, so the sun's influence grows stronger

and at 50 degrees of latitude,
a radical transformation begins.
and at 50 degrees of latitude, a radical transformation begins.

Summers here are long enough
for broad—leaved trees to replace conifers.
Summers here are long enough for broad—leaved trees to replace conifers.
Broad leaves are much easier to eat and digest
Broad leaves are much easier to eat and digest

so now animals can collect
their share of the energy
so now animals can collect their share of the energy
that has come from the sun.
that has come from the sun.

It's summer and these forests
are bustling with life.
It's summer and these forests are bustling with life.
But the good times will not last.
But the good times will not last.

Broad leaves must be shed in winter
for they're damaged by frost.
Broad leaves must be shed in winter for they're damaged by frost.

As they disappear, so the land becomes barren
with little for animals to eat.
As they disappear, so the land becomes barren with little for animals to eat.

The inhabitants must migrate, hibernate
or face months of near—starvation.
The inhabitants must migrate, hibernate or face months of near—starvation.
